finding.applicability_hypothesis: Structured concurrency bounds task lifetimes to a parent scope, eliminating orphaned tasks and making cancellation deterministic. — Refactor the agent runtime to spawn child tasks inside a JoinSet owned by the supervising scope. (domain: rust-async)
finding.suggested_action: Refactor the agent runtime to spawn child tasks inside a JoinSet owned by the supervising scope.
finding.summary: Structured concurrency bounds task lifetimes to a parent scope, eliminating orphaned tasks and making cancellation deterministic.
finding.title: Adopt structured concurrency for agent task supervision

weakness_link.gap_summary: Adopt structured concurrency for agent task supervision
